markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, process improvements, and holiday planning.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality:** Brooke's reviews are slowed by repetitive AI-generated content. GrowthX will adjust its model inputs to improve flow and reduce redundancy.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:** To prevent a post-holiday backlog, GrowthX will scale back production to 3–5 articles during You.com's Dec 19–Jan 5 content freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Comparison Content:** This high-value content is blocked by a lack of internal positioning info. Brooke will seek battle cards and schedule a January sync with Product Marketing Lead Justin.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [**Webflow Process:** Aida will investigate generating two image sizes per article (900x600 for on-page, 1200x627 for Open Graph) to streamline publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Process Improvements

  - [**Problem:** Brooke's reviews are slowed by repetitive, AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Goal:** Prioritize shorter, high-quality articles (e.g., 800–900 words) over longer, redundant ones.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will adjust its model inputs to improve flow and reduce repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Action:** Regenerate "artifacts" (internal source documents) with a customer-facing tone.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides stronger signals to the AI model, guiding it toward a more natural, less generic output.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Contingency:** If the current batch of 5 articles still shows these issues, GrowthX will post-process all delivered articles to fix them.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Holiday Content Plan

  - [**Context:** You.com has a content freeze from Dec 19 to Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Goal:** Prevent a large review backlog for Brooke after the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will scale back production to 3–5 articles during the freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Brooke's Plan:** Review the current backlog of 15 articles before the break.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### Comparison Content Strategy

  - [**Opportunity:** Comparison articles perform well and are a key content type to pursue.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Brooke lacks the internal positioning information to guide this content.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [**Complexity:** You.com's product relationships are nuanced (e.g., using ChatGPT models, being wrapped by Brave).](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**Path Forward:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Brooke will request internal battle cards.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Schedule a January sync with Justin (Product Marketing Lead) to get the necessary product angles.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Pipeline & Publishing Updates

  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish:** 3 articles staged in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [**In Editing:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Backlog:** 10 articles awaiting review.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
      - [**Approved:** 14 topics ready to start.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Keyword Change:** The article on AI agents in the legal industry was updated to target the more specific keyword "legal AI agents."](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Webflow Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Image Sizing:** Webflow requires two sizes per image. Aida will ask Katya to generate both to streamline Brooke's publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Formatting:** Brooke will continue manual pre-publish checks for tables and other formatting quirks.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Analytics & Data Integrity

  - [**Context:** Aida flagged multiple properties in Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [`home.u.com`: Old HubSpot blog; all URLs should redirect to `u.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [`about.u.com`: Internal reverse proxy; URLs should not be used publicly.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [`u.com`: The correct public property for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard pulls GSC data from both `about.u.com` and `u.com` to ensure a complete dataset.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**GA4 Changes:** Brooke's team is consolidating GA4 tags, which may cause temporary data fluctuations.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [Ask Katya to generate two image sizes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Adjust AI model inputs to reduce content repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [Scale back production to 3–5 articles during the holiday freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [Review the 15 articles in the backlog before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Request internal battle cards for comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Schedule a January sync with Justin (Product Marketing Lead).](https://fathom.video/share/5bxK8PuK_o5FtzcdxvEuVJtraHNyzwS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
